entry.title: Re: Building a docker image of a cds-dk app on a Raspberr...
entry.content:
The error you're seeing ("Illegal instruction (core dumped)") likely stems from a hardware architecture mismatch. Your Raspberry Pi uses an ARM processor, while your Windows machine uses x86, causing some packages like `@sap/hana-client` to fail.

With versions 2.14^, Linux ARM64 support is now available for the `@sap/hana-client` Node.js driver. Given this, you should be able to use it on your Raspberry Pi with some adjustments.

Here’s what you can do:

1. Ensure you're using the latest version of `@sap/hana-client`: Update your `package.json` or install the latest version with ARM64 support:
```
npm install @sap/hana-client@latest
```

2. Verify the platform compatibility: When building your Docker image, make sure you're targeting `linux/arm64` to match the Raspberry Pi’s architecture:
```
docker buildx build --platform linux/arm64 -t my-cap-app .
```

entry.title: Re: Parallel Accounting and Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S4 HANA Finance
entry.content: @sanilbhandari Thanks for your kind feedback!!!!!!!! It will be helpful to rethink and develop new volume on UPA. In my next blog, I will cover configuration activities, concept of fiscal year, multicurrency and group valuation related to UPA.

entry.title: Changing useful life of an asset class
entry.content:
Hello to all,

I want to ask a question about useful life of asset class. Could you please kindly advice if it is possible to change the useful life of an asset class ? Need your help and advice.

Regards,

FIN Asset Accounting

entry.title: Re: Parallel Accounting and Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S4 HANA Finance
entry.content: @DataTherapist Thanks for your continuous support and guidance at every steps.

entry.title: How to call a Local REST API ( a Custom RAP API ) inside another API in BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

The context of my POST is somewhat related to as that of the below one,

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/rap-managed-with-additional-save-exception-handling/qaq-p/12577904

In our case we need to update another Table inside the same RAP LUW, when we raise an Exception using FAILED parameter. But here the issue is if FAILED is raised then whole RAP BO LUW goes into ROLLBACK state and hence none of the DB Operations gets applied.

And the Table we have to update is a ERROR LOG table to record some of the details during the Failure.

So, for this as a solution we had created a RAP Web API on top of the ERROR_LOG Table we had and that we tried calling inside the the Original RAP Interface Web API. 

We tried with all the options for creating the destination, i.e.:

1.) cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url

2.) cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_cloud_destination

3.) cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement

Regarding the Comm Arrangement, we created a Comm Arrangement for Inbound call and once we did this we were able to successfully call the ERROR_LOG RAP API using the POSTMAN tool.

But when we call this inside the MAIN RAP API Program for logging the Error its not working, our Impression was that when it works for POSTMAN, then cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url should have worked by passing hardcode Credentials for Authentication.

But it returns UCON error,

Can anyone suggest how we can resolve this and why this error is coming when the system is trying to call itself only.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Data Source search not working with HANA calculation view in Business application studio (CAP )
Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: Thanks for week1 table.It helps to navigate .

entry.title: Re: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

what are your special needs? To clear both incoming and outgoing payments? Well for that purpose we propose Business Partner Payment (0010). But you mentioned it already as not sufficient. But you have not stated why.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Sao Paulo Group - Bem vindos ao Grupo de Sao Paulo
entry.content:
Bom dia, Maurício!

Primeiramente muito obrigado pela resposta.

Eu fiz sim uma busca mas, devido a falta de conhecimento e experiência, não consegui chegar aos nomes que você sugeriu: Ka Solution e GPLux.

Sobre a SAP University Alliances não sei se pesquisei certo pois fui até um site e deixei um questionamento que nunca foi retornado.

Mas vou guardar sua resposta e pesquisar por estes nomes sugeridos. Meu objetivo é agregar os conhecimentos que possuo em Finanças e Contabilidade e aprender sobre o SAP, tentando ser alguém que auxilie em implantações e parametrizações.

Abs e muito sucesso!

entry.title: Building custom Excel view in SAPUI5 : Technical Part 2
entry.content:
I am starting a small blog series on how to build an excel editor. This might help if you are learning freestyle UI5 development and working with Files.

This is part 2 of the blog series and focus of this blog will be on applying custom CSS to the application to achieve basic look and feel of excel.

Check out Part 1 -  before jumping to this blog.

After completing Part 1, we were able to achieve file upload, data parsing and generate tabs and tables dynamically.

But, This does not look like excel at all !! 

    Excel has tabs at the bottom of the screen, right?

    Excel has many utility buttons under Menu Bar, right?

    we want vertical lines as well for the table.

 

lets try to add these features.

1. Tabs at the bottom

all you have to do is change CSS Properties to change positions of Header and Content.

Add a custom style class in IconTabFilter and then change properties in CSS File.

<IconTabBar id="id_itb" class="excel">
  <items>
    <IconTabFilter text="worksheet1">
      <ScrollContainer  ... old code as it is >
        <Table ... old code as it is>
        </Table>
      </ScrollContainer>
    </IconTabFilter>
  </items>
</IconTabBar>

 

.excel{
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column-reverse;
}

 

After updating the code, refresh the app. 

 

2. Tool Bar

Add below fragment to the View.

Create a new Fragment with name : File.fragment.xml

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <HBox >
        <VBox>
            <!-- first box -->
            <HBox >
                <VBox >
                    <Button icon="sap-icon://paste" class="" />
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiTinyMarginBegin">
                    <Button icon="sap-icon://scissors"/>
                    <Button icon="sap-icon://copy"/>
                    <Button icon="sap-icon://write-new"/>
                </VBox>
            </HBox>
        </VBox>

        <ToolbarSeparator class="sapUiTinyMarginBeginEnd"/>

        <!-- second box -->
        <VBox >
            <HBox >
                <ComboBox width="100px"/>
                <ComboBox width="70px"/>
            </HBox>
            <HBox >
                <Button text="B"/>
                <Button text="I"/>
                <Button text="U"/>
                <ToolbarSeparator class="sapUiTinyMarginBeginEnd sapUiTinyMarginBeginTop"/>
                <Button icon="sap-icon://table-chart"/>
                <ToolbarSeparator class="sapUiTinyMarginBeginEnd sapUiTinyMarginBeginTop"/>
                <Button icon="sap-icon://paint-bucket"/>

                <Button text="A"/>

            </HBox>
        </VBox>


        <ToolbarSeparator class="sapUiTinyMarginBeginEnd"/>
        <!-- second third box -->
        <VBox>

            <HBox >
                <!-- <VBox >
                    <Button icon="sap-icon://paste" class="" />
                </VBox> -->
                <VBox class="sapUiTinyMarginBegin">
                    <HBox >
                        <Button icon="sap-icon://indent"/>
                        <Button icon="sap-icon://outdent"/>
                    </HBox>
                    <HBox >
                        <Button icon="sap-icon://text-align-left"/>
                        <Button icon="sap-icon://text-align-center"/>
                        <Button icon="sap-icon://text-align-right"/>
                    </HBox>



                </VBox>
            </HBox>

        </VBox>
    </HBox>

</core:FragmentDefinition>

Add it to your existing view.

<IconTabBar >
    <items>
        <IconTabFilter text="File">
            <items>
                <IconTabFilter text="Save"/>
            </items>
            <content>
              <c:Fragment fragmentName="your-ns.view.File" type="XML"/>
            </content>
        </IconTabFilter>
        <IconTabFilter text="Home"></IconTabFilter>
        ... old content as it is ...
        
    </items>
</IconTabBar>

After that, it should look like..

3.  horizontal and vertical lines ( borders ) in the sap m Table.

Add below style class to CSS file.

.sapMListTblCell {
    border-left: 1px solid #ccc;
}

 

After that, it should look like..

If you do not want a border on left hand side of first column then apply CSS for rest of the columns only.

It can be achieved by First-child property of CSS selectors.

entry.title: Re: What is the SAP Companion for desktop (formerly Desktop Assistant)?

Is it so that for each logon langauge we have to record the sessions.

Thanks

Best Regards,

Vaishali Rawat

entry.title: Re: Scheduling RMS Flows in Data Intelligence via the Internal API
entry.content: Hello again @Ian_Henry , I managed to launch the process, and it worked. But once it is completed, I cannot launch it again, apparently it is not executed. Did this happen to you in 2022? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Thank you, @sveabecker , for the suggestions!

entry.title: Re: Business Objects 4.3 Upgrade from 4.2.9 -- License workflow
entry.content:
No need to remove the BI4.2 licenses prior to the upgrade.  But you should request the new license keys and have them ready when you start.

I honestly don't remember if you're asked for the key during the upgrade process; I don't believe you will be.  But if not, you will definitely be able to log in to the CMC afterwards to apply the new key.  The SIA and CMS will start, and you'll be able to log in with any existing user account.  You just won't be able to create new users or use most of the applications until the key is applied.

entry.title: Host a CodeJam in Berlin
entry.content:
Hello,

I have asked this question before, but perhaps in the wrong discussion forum, so I am renewing my request here again: After our first successful CodeJam session in June in Berlin, we would like to organize and host another CodeJam. The desired topic is

Combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack ApplicationsThe period would be the early or mid-December 2024 or January next year.

I would be happy if it were possible to organize another joint CodeJam.

Kind regards

Robby

entry.title: Re: Can you trust Pam?
entry.content:
Another point to consider is also the maintenance phases for products. Some products go in to extended maintenance and others directly go in to customer specific maintenance.

For solutions like Business objects priority-one support is provided.

A good view of what theses maintenance phases mean can be viewed at : https://support.sap.com/en/release-upgrade-maintenance/maintenance-information/maintenance-strategy/maintenance-phases.html

Witin PAM it also shows what products extended maintenance is provided for.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

I’m Reshma Selvaraj from India.

As a woman, I see great value in this digital skills initiative as a means to pay it forward and assist others in starting their transformation journeys. While I’m committed to staying motivated in my learning, I believe it’s even more crucial to promise that I’ll share my experiences and knowledge to help educate others when the time comes.

I’m eager to enhance my skills in SAP technology and secure a job opportunity soon.

entry.title: SAP build work zone, Custom Visualization of Tile is not opening the app when clicked on it
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue regarding the SAP work zone. I am using Custom Visualization of Tile as described in below documentation and blogs - 

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/implement-custom-visualization
and
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/implement-a-custom-visualization-tile-launchpad/qaq-p/12483243

I have deployed it to SAP build work zone, and the visualization is working, but  when I click on the tile it is not redirecting me to the app with sematic object-action instead it is on #Shell-home only and there are no errors in console as well.

To check the code, here are the github link of both apps are as follows (mainly changes are in manifest.json file) - 

HTMl5 custom tile - https://github.com/Dipesh1001/html5.customtile

Demo Fiori Project - https://github.com/Dipesh1001/project1

 

Looking Forward to solution.

Thanks and Regards, 

Dipender

entry.title: Re: Display order of sections in New Learning Home page
entry.content:
In 1H 2024 the custom section (swimlane) could be placed in one of 4 places:

  1. below “Requests for Me”,
  2. above “Bookmarks”,
  3. below “Bookmarks”, or
  4. At the bottom of the page

Not sure if we are getting more options in 2H 2024.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: So curious, it came out of the ocean to participate 🙂

entry.title: Re: Automatically populate Person Responsible in IW32/33...
entry.content:
The logic that displays this field (a subscreen in a subscreen) looks like 

 

* Anlagezustand Text ermitteln
 FIELD CAUFVD-ANLZU MODULE ANLZU_CHECK_PBO.
 CALL SUBSCREEN PARTNER  INCLUDING Y_PARTNER_PROGRAM " <--- here
                                   Y_SUB_DYNPRO_PARTNER.
 CALL SUBSCREEN SUB_PM_ADDR INCLUDING YSAPLCOIH PM_ADDR.

 

Values come from Customizing (a partner type)

 

      SELECT SINGLE * FROM TPAR INTO LS_TPAR
      WHERE PARVW = T350-PARVW_VERA.

      IF LS_TPAR-NRART = 'PE'.
                                       "/ screen from saplcoih.
        Y_PARTNER_PROGRAM    = YSAPLCOIH.
        Y_SUB_DYNPRO_PARTNER = Y_SUB_DYNPRO_PARTNER_COIH.

      ELSE.
                                       "/ screen from SAPLIPAR
        Y_PARTNER_PROGRAM    = YSAPLIPAR.
        Y_SUB_DYNPRO_PARTNER = Y_SUB_DYNPRO_PARTNER_KOPF.

      ENDIF.

 

NB: 'PE' means that the partner is an employee

In the MASS change transaction for PM ordres, there is a mapping that link also to partner

Class CL_IWO_MASS_CHANGE_STANDARD2 method GET_HEADER_MAPPING

    et_mapping_table = VALUE #( ( structure = 'BAPI_ALM_ORDER_HEADERS_I'          bapi_fieldname = 'ORDPLANID'                    internal_fieldname = 'MAINTENANCEORDERPLANNINGCODE' )
" ...
                                ( structure = 'BAPI_ALM_ORDER_PARTN_MUL'          bapi_fieldname = 'RESPONSIBLEUSER'              internal_fieldname = 'RESPONSIBLEUSER'               )
" ...

Try to debug on your system.

entry.title: No expense type for estimated costs has been defined. Cannot save.
entry.content:
Hi All,

After going through so many threads on internet I understood that  I need to  maintain the maintenance view V_T706B1 and create an expense type for which I choose out of the 'special use' drop down box the value

'estimated cost, no reimbursement'.

What I don't understand that do I need to  create a new standalone expense type for estimated cost OR Do I change all the existing EXP Type.

Can Someone help.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: A Simplified Guide to Effectively Use the Clearing API
entry.content:
Hi Lina,

Good day to you! I found some other limitations with the Clearing API

The API doesn't allow passing Special G/L indicator (UMSKZ) or indicator to Select Only open Items which are NOT Special GL (XNOPS). These two fields are available in FB05 transaction but not in the Bulk Clearing API

This is a big limitation for one of our development using this API

Are there any techniques to pass these vales while still using the API?

I check FI Substitution but do not find these fiels in available fields for substitution at item level

Best regards,

Vishnu T

entry.title: SAP BPA : Unable to open project
entry.content:
Hi,

Since the new release of SAP BPA today, I am unable to open any project, it just shows a blank white screen.

Is anyone else also facing the same issue?

Regards,

Himanshu

@Archana

entry.title: Re: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction...
entry.content: Thank you for your response! To clarify, I have defined separate processing rules for clearing incoming payments and outgoing payments, each with different criteria. I have already tried using the Business Partner Payment (0010) instruction, but unfortunately, it hasn’t worked as expected for my scenario; the system does not find any transactions to clear (even though the payment exists with the same amount and date). Specifically, I would like to reconcile both incoming and outgoing payments (separately) that are already recorded in the system, using a rule where the amount and date match the bank statement entries. However, despite these criteria matching, the reconciliation isn’t happening as I would expect. Do you have any further suggestions or adjustments I could make to the current setup? Thank you again for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAC - search for values in story filters has stopped working after upgrade
entry.content: Did you find a workaround to this? We just hit this problem with a Q3.2024 release.

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello @christoph_pohl  
we actually were able to connect our BTP ABAP environment to a git repo and with the exception that is not an onPrem repo but a repo that is available though the internet, it worked like a charm. 

The thing that confuses me, is that the structure of the git repository deviates significantly from the ones that normally would be created by abapGit. 

This comes by surprise since, you seemed to have a commitment at SAP to be reliable in this aspect. 

"This endeavour is on the one hand a commitment of SAP to use these file formats in the future whenever ABAP objects need to be written to files, e.g., in ADT and gCTS, and on the other hand an offer to the ABAP community to adopt them also in abapGit and other tools."
 https://github.com/SAP/abap-file-formats 

I like the thought that we have a git repository assigned to a software component such that the repository  is complete and can serve as backup as well as a base for analysis.
 
Could you elaborate in which direction the git structure will evolve? Will there be a consolidation at one point or do we have to deal with both concepts. 
Kind regards, 
Christian

entry.title: SAP CAP Service Integration OData $select Bad Request, CAP Types and Complex Types
entry.content:
Dear all,

while consuming a OData-Service build with RAP from a S4 System i noticed that CAP / @sap-cloud-sdk/http-client generates malformed requests.

I tracked the source of my issue. The RAP metadata contains:

 

<ComplexType Name="EntityControl">
        <Property Name="Deletable" Type="Edm.Boolean" Nullable="false" />
	<Property Name="Updatable" Type="Edm.Boolean" Nullable="false" />
</ComplexType>

 

Imported via `cds import` the following will be generated:

 

@CDS.external : true
type v0001.EntityControl {
  Deletable : Boolean not null;
  Updatable : Boolean not null;
};

 

The generated request will look like this from CAP to RAP and leads to an error:

 

/ENTITYSET?$select=TYPE_Deletable,TYPE_Updatable

 

The correct request working with the RAP based service would be:

 

/ENTITYSET?$select=TYPE/Deletable,TYPE/Updatable

 

By looking into how CAP based services generate their metdata, i found out that types are not converted to "ComplexTypes" in odata but rather into simple fields with the name of the compley type prepanded and connected to the field name via `_`.
Exmaple Response from RAP:

 

{
 ID: 1,
 TYPE : {
  Deletable: true,
  Updateable: true
 }
}

 

Response from CAP:

 

{
 ID: 1,
 TYPE_Deletable: true,
 TYPE_Updateable: true
}

 

How can i import a *.edmx from a RAP service into CAP so that CAP generates valid requests for entities containing complex types?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Hi,Any news on increase of 401K Catch-Up Contribution Limit for Participants 60-63 ?

entry.title: Re: BSI Tax factory 11 client issues

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Implement Observability in a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide
entry.content: HI Mantrisagar, just to clarify the apps need to be instrumented to send out data to two targets: Logging stack and CALM backend. CLS/ALS are not sending data to CALM, the application should send data to CALM. The procedure to setup your application for both CLS/CALM is explained here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-developer-guide-cap/tree/main/documentation/observability

entry.title: Re: Hi,Any news on increase of 401K Catch-Up Contribution Limit for Participants 60-63 ?
entry.content: Hi bdas, meanwhile SAP published two notes for this topic: 3470796 and 3511561. I hope this helps. KR Salina

entry.content:
Hi Wesley,

Good day to you! I found some other limitations with the Clearing API

The API doesn't allow passing Special G/L indicator (UMSKZ) or indicator to Select Only open Items which are NOT Special GL (XNOPS). These two fields are available in FB05 transaction but not in the Bulk Clearing API

This is a big limitation for one of our development using this API

Are there any techniques to pass these vales while still using the API?

I check FI Substitution but do not find these fiels in available fields for substitution at item level

Best regards,

Vishnu T

entry.title: How to configure RFC Destination for Push Notification for SAP Service and Asset Manager SSAM 2310
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to configure push notification feature in SAP Service and Asset Manager but I have some doubts regarding it.

 

What should be the value of path prefix here?

Do I have to put the ID which is there in my mobile service application

When I remove the path prefix from RFC Destination and do "connection test", it gives status code 200

 

But when I add the path prefix as /restnotification/application/<appid>/user and do connection test, it gives 404 error.

with response body as : {"description":"Unknown request","error_code":"CF-NotFound","code":10000}

I also added the user and password in the security details, but it didnt help.

entry.title: Re: How to call a Local REST API ( a Custom RAP API ) ins...
entry.content:
try this CL_ABAP_PARALLEL (if_abap_parallel)

no need to make remote api call.

entry.title: Re: Knowledge Exchange B1 Production Module
entry.content: @Yadharthavel, Thank you very much for the detailed reply and please excuse my late answer! I have two main issues with the general process: 1. It seems rather laborious to update and finalize the various production orders if you have a large number of them at any given time 2. We unfortunately do not have perpetual inventory valuation which seems to be a major issue as the actual production cost do not affect the valuation of the parent item which is always only the “Production Standard Cost”. As these tend to increase over time, we do not adhere to the Lowest Value Principle and already tried some workarounds for that but none are really what we need Thanks for any further feedback and best regards!

entry.title: SAP EarlyWatch Alert now reminds you on SAP Notes recommended in customer cases
entry.content:
The SAP EarlyWatch Alert service aims to ensure smooth operation of individual SAP components by alerting customers pro-actively before severe problems occur. The service now is extended to remind you about topics that need your attention based on the issues reported in customer cases previously. It targets those cases where SAP Notes were recommended as resolutions (when the same SAP Notes were recommended at least three times in the cases).  


What is Offered?
We have established an automated process between SAP Notes, Customer cases, and the SAP EarlyWatch Alert service. As a result, we have the latest information on SAP Notes (with corrections only) that were recommended to customers in the cases.

Equipped with this information, the SAP EarlyWatch Alert tool checks if you already implemented the SAP Notes which were recommended at least 3 times in your cases. When the SAP Notes are still missing, an alert is triggered.

In case of missing 3 or more 'Very High' or 'High' priority SAP Notes, a 'RED' alert is triggered. And, in case of missing 3 or more 'Medium' or 'Low' priority SAP Notes, a 'YELLOW' alert is triggered.

When alerted you get the list of the SAP Notes along with their priority, the number of times they were recommended in your previous cases, and a link to the latest customer case. 

To check if you have missing SAP Notes in your system which were recommended at least 3 times in your cases,  use the free text search with the keyword 'customer case' in solution finder:

 

Use this new  check provided with the SAP EarlyWatch Alert service and provide feedback to SAP.

To know more details about SAP EarlyWatch Alert refer to Official SAP EarlyWatch Alert Support Offering ,1257308 - FAQ: Using EarlyWatch Alert. Refer to the blog   SAP EWA Workspace to gain an overview on your system landscape health.

To view the alerts that have been raised for missing SAP Notes based on customer cases in your system, you can access the SAP EarlyWatch Alert Solution Finder and enter the text 'SAP Notes which were recommended in your customer cases' in the Enter Search Term field.

In case you wish to Hide or Snooze this alert in the Solution Finder , refer to the Blog Hide & Snooze SAP EarlyWatch Alerts - SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: OData V4 / CDS - $count not implemented
entry.content: "CDS annotations which automatically creates OData." It's not automatic if you have to register in /iwbep/v4_admin and annotations are not needed in this case.

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to utilize the SAP Self-Billing Cockpit within SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing SAP Self-Billing Cockpit learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will focus on the SAP Self-Billing Cockpit, an SAP Industry Cloud solution designed to streamline and automate self-billing processes. The key functionalities such as receiving self-billing transmissions, updating invoices and journal entries, detecting and recording differences, and preparing documents for the clearing process in accounts receivable will be covered. You will learn to analyze and monitor usage, manage error lists, and understand the commercial model and licensing metrics. The course aims to equip SAP consultants with the knowledge to effectively implement and utilize the SAP Self-Billing Cockpit within SAP S/4HANA environments.

Learning objectives
At the end of this learning journey, participants will be able to effectively navigate and utilize the SAP Self-Billing Cockpit within SAP S/4HANA environments. Learners will gain proficiency in receiving self-billing transmissions, updating invoices and journal entries, and managing the clearing process in accounts receivable. Additionally, the course will cover how to detect and record discrepancies in self-billing documents and prepare them for confirmation. Participants will also learn to analyze and monitor usage, manage error lists, and understand the commercial model and licensing metrics associated with the SAP Self-Billing Cockpit. This comprehensive understanding will enable SAP consultants to implement and optimize the use of the SAP Self-Billing Cockpit, enhancing their ability to streamline and automate self-billing processes effectively.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Configuring Custom MDF objects for reportability using Story reports.
entry.content:
Hi!

I followed the steps above but the schema and objects are still not available in Story. There is the need to do any refresh or sync between SSF and SAC?

 

Thx,

Ramona

entry.title: Re: Transaction key RA2 chart of accounts RAJ1 not define...
entry.content:
Hi Shubham,

It seems to be an error with the setting in OB40 only. Can you please go to table T030K and check if you have a GL account assigned for COA RAJ1, transaction type RA2, and the tax code you are using for your posting?

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Integration von SAP Enable Now & SAP Cloud ALM und der Mehrwert für die Content-Erstellung
entry.content:
Am, 19. September fand der SAP Enable Now Roundtable in Berlin statt. Unsere Community-Kaffee-Ecke war dort zu Besuch und schaltete sich virtuell dazu. Mike Fritz, Host des Roundtables gab dabei einen Input, wie die Integration von SAP Enable Now und SAP Cloud ALM sicherstellt, dass Transformationsprojekte und die Erstellung von Hilfeinhalten und Dokumentation synchronisiert sind. Die Integration ermöglicht eine zielgerichtete und effiziente Aktualisierung von Trainingsinhalten bei Prozessänderungen. Hier die Zusammenfassung des Inputs und der Diskussion.

Einführung in das Business TransformationOffering rund um SAP Signavio, CloudALM, LeanIX, WalkMe und Co.

Die digitale Transformation umfasst mehrere Dimensionen wie Menschen, Prozesse, Technologie und Daten. SAP Activate ist die SAP Methodik, um diese Transformation über verschiedene Phasen hinweg zu steuern. Dabei spielt die In-App-Unterstützung, Enablement und Dokumentation eine wichtige Rolle. Die beiden Grafiken zeigen dabei gut die Sicht auf die Handlungsfelder sowie auf die verschiedenen Angebote von SAP & Partnern.

Abbildung 1: Ansatz der ganzheitlichen Transformation 

Abbildung 2: So unterstützt SAP und Partner die Transformation

 SAP Cloud ALM als zentrales Projektmanagement-Tool

SAP Cloud ALM dient als umfassendes Projektmanagement-Werkzeug für die digitale Transformation.

Es ermöglicht:

  • Die Definition von Aufgaben und Arbeitspaketen
  • Die Strukturierung von Projekten in sogenannte "Scopes"
  • Die Verwaltung von Best Practice-Szenarien und Business-Prozessen
  • sog. Acceleratoren wie Modelle, Test-Skripte sind hinterlegt

Es hat somit viele Standards wie End to End Business Szenarien wie lead to cash, die man implementieren kann. Das hilft beim Vorkonfigurieren und Vorkonfektionieren – und dient sozusagen als ein SAP Cloud Projekt Management Tool.

Integration von SAP Enable Now und SAP Cloud ALM

SAP Enable Now wird als Content-Erstellungs- und Wissensmanagement-Lösung in SAP Cloud ALM connected:

  • Eine spezielle "Cloud ALM Work Area" in Enable Now verbindet sich mit dem entsprechenden Projekt-Scope in Cloud ALM
  • Die Projektstruktur aus Cloud ALM kann in Enable Now repliziert werden
  • Wissensmanager und Content-Autoren erhalten so direkten Zugriff auf relevante Projektinformationen - alle Materialien von CALM können „rübergezogen“ werden (Scope, Doku, Handbücher etc vom CALM)   

Somit hat man alle Infos im System für die Content Entwicklung – ob Handbücher, Hilfe, E-Learning etc. ohne Medienbruch.

Weitere Integration: Signavio Process Manager & SAP Enable Now

SAP Signavio unterstützt u.a. bei der Prozessmodellierung. Zwischen den Prozessmodellen und SAP Enable Now gibt es eine Integration, die sicherstellt, dass bei Veränderungen im Prozess (Changes, Deltas) eine Info über die Changes und die relevante Zielgruppe in SAP Enable Now erfolgt und dort über die In App Hilfe an die Nutzer weitergegeben werden kann.

Vorteile der Integration

  • Synchronisierung von Transformationsprojekt und Content-Erstellung
  • Zielgerichteter Zugriff auf Projektinformationen für Content-Autoren -  die Content-Autoren erhalten Arbeitsaufträge zum Transformationsprojekt direkt in ihrer Arbeitsumgebung.
  • Die Integration ermöglicht eine zielgerichtete und effiziente Aktualisierung von Trainingsinhalten bei Prozessänderungen.
  • Bessere Einbettung des Trainings in die SAP Activate Methodik

Ausblick und die Rolle von WalkMe

Eine weitere Vertiefung der Integration ist geplant, mit der Fokussierung von SAP Enable Now auf E-Learning Content-Erstellung und Wissensmanagement. Mitte September 2024 hat SAP die Übernahme von WalkMe offiziell bekannt gegeben. Weitere Details werden nun ausgearbeitet.  

Die Verknüpfung von Cloud ALM und SAP Enable Now vereinfacht die Erstellung von Trainingsmaterial und bettet das Trainingsteilprojekt optimal in das SAP Projekt entlang der SAP Activate Methodologie ein.

Was ist weiter potentiell in Planung? Mehr Reporting wie Lernfortschritt – derzeit sehen wir erst die erste Iteration. Wir von SAP freuen uns über Feedback von ersten Anwendungen oder über Change Requests rund um die Integration im Influence  Portal zur Weiterentwicklung mit Kunden. Hier ist die SAP Enable Now Influence Opportunity.

 Tipps für die Praxis und Recap:

 Synchronisieren Sie regelmäßig die Projektstruktur zwischen Cloud ALM und SAP Enable Now

  • Verwenden Sie die integrierten Inhalte und Prozessmodelle als Grundlage für Ihre Trainingsinhalte
  • Geben Sie Feedback zur Integration, um die Weiterentwicklung zu unterstützen
  • Bereiten Sie sich auf eine stärkere Fokussierung von SAP Enable Now auf Content-Erstellung und Wissensmanagement vor

Die Integration von SAP Enable Now und SAP Cloud ALM bietet viele Vorteile für die Content-Erstellung in Transformationsprojekten. Sie ermöglicht eine engere Verzahnung von Projektmanagement und Trainingsaktivitäten, vereinfacht Arbeitsabläufe und verbessert die Aktualität und Relevanz von Trainingsinhalten.

Obwohl die Integration noch am Anfang steht, zeigt sie großes Potenzial für die Zukunft der digitalen Transformation und des Change Managements in SAP-Projekten. Vor allem, da nun mit WalkMe noch ein sehr mächtiges Toolset dazukommt.

Fragen und Antworten

Frage: Signavio & CALM Integration

Dazu muss man das bpmn herunterladen und importieren.

 

Frage: Ist eine Integration in das Testmanagement angedacht?

A: Ja, eine Integration des Testmanagements ist möglich, jedoch nicht die Test-Automatisierung, dazu gibt es spezielle Tools.

 

Frage: Wie funktioniert die Integration zwischen Signavio und SAP Enable Now?

A: Signavio und SAP Enable Now sind bereits integriert. Bei Prozessänderungen in Signavio kann ein Häkchen gesetzt werden, um eine Change Awareness zu erzeugen und Informationen über notwendige Content-Anpassungen zu erhalten.

 

Frage: Gibt es Möglichkeiten, Feedback zur Integration von SAP Enable Now und SAP Cloud ALM zu geben?

A: Ja, es wurde auf die SAP Enable Now Influence Opportunity hingewiesen, wo Kunden Feedback geben und Vorschläge machen können.

 

Frage: Wo kann man mehr über Change Management und Training im SAP-Kontext erfahren?

A: Es wurde auf die monatliche "SAP Change und Training Kaffee Ecke" hingewiesen, die regelmäßige Termine und Zusammenfassungen bietet. Termine finden sich immer hier zum anmelden oder in der LinkedInGruppe

Die nächste Kaffee-Ecke dreht sich um „Change Readiness Analysen in Wissenschaft und SAP-Praxis“ und findet am Donnerstag, 17. Oktober 2024, 15:00 Uhr statt.

 

Frage: Gibt es kostenlose Lernressourcen für SAP Enable Now?

A: Ja, es gibt kostenlose Lerninhalte auf der SAP Learning-Plattform. Die Zertifizierung ist kostenpflichtig. Hier der Link . Eine weitere, wichtige Ressource ist das SAP Enable Now Info Center.

entry.title: Creating users, workers and business partners creates two BPs?
entry.content:
When creating users, an employee and a business partner with the employee function are automatically created (example BP1).
Afterwards, we need to create a work agreement.
We create the work agreement in the employee that was created when creating the user.
When doing this, the BP is duplicated, another one is created with the same data with the occupation function (example BP2), because when creating the work agreement it is not possible to put the BP already created.
The result is two BPs:
- BP1: employee related to a contract that has BP2 as a business partner
- BP2: occupation with a contract related to business partner BP2

Is it normal for it to be duplicated?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Creating users, workers and business partners creates...
entry.content: This is normal system behaviour, please review the SAP Help Documentation: Business Partner Model in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: User-defined fields order
entry.content:
Hi, check the restrictions step 5 please.

  1. Open the Form: Navigate to the specific form (e.g., Sales Order, Customer Master, etc.) that contains the UDFs.

  2. Enable Layout Configuration:

    • Go to "Form Settings" or select "Set Layout" from the menu.

  3. Rearrange UDFs:

    • In the layout editor, find the UDFs.
    • Drag and drop the UDFs to the desired positions to set their display order.

  4. Save Changes: After arranging the UDFs, save the layout to apply the changes.

  5. Check Permissions: Ensure there are no restrictions on field visibility that could affect user access.

  6. Test the Layout: Exit the layout editor and open the form to verify the new display order for all users.

These steps will help you set the display order of UDFs across the selected form for all users in SAP Business One.

hope this help you

entry.title: Is it possible to switch my CDS view (odata v2) for POs to OData v4?
Re: Use of Glossary in Live System
entry.content:
Dirk's right, as always... the only way the Glossary works in SEN is if the text is embedded in content that is stored in SEN (such as custom SAP Companion Context bubbles or Guided Tour steps), and then you have to run the Apply Glossary process over that content in Producer to create the hyperlinks to the Glossary. There's no mechanism for SAP Companion to magically read the text in a live system and display definitions for it. For a simple way to link to your Glossary, I would set up a Link Tile in Companion on your system's Home screen, and point the Link Tile to the Glossary folder in the SEN Manager workarea. When a Learner (non-author) clicks that Link Tile, the Library View will display in a separate browser window where they can scroll through or search for a Glossary term. Of course, you would have had to build Glossary terms (manually or via spreadsheet import) for all the words in your system that you think people would want to see a definition for. I have never seen a customer bother to do this, but there's always a first time. Glossary is always a nice-to-have, but rarely gets implemented because it's usually the lowest priority. 

Also, you said that none of your SAP Companion content is displaying. So you have to check several things...

  • Is your system compatible with SAP Companion (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENABLE_NOW/de298b01689a443a9afcedbbee576276/8846a96defa24795a97db8211b47c024.html)?
  • Is SAP Companion configured correctly, and pointing to an SEN Manager workarea where your content is stored (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENABLE_NOW/502d46c81ecd4ce29cd29a7c47f1e057/47f204276dac10149e2f9c8ae863832c.html) ?
  • Is your content (such as simulations or book pages) tagged with the correct Context Properties (and user language, as needed) to display on the Fiori page where you expect to see it (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENABLE_NOW/f4b0c3f388484ab988422d41d6002bcc/7bffbb016edb1014bfc985fb448c9095.html)?
  • Is it Published in the SEN Manager so that is visible to Learners (non-authors)?
  • Are you testing on the same screen in Fiori as the screen for which your content is tagged in the Context Properties?
  • If you applied a hotspot to a Context or Tour bubble, is that hotspotted object visible on the Fiori screen as you test, so that the associated Companion bubble displays?
  • Have you set up Single Sign On to the SEN Manager server, so that a Learner is authenticated automatically when they try to view SAP Companion content stored on the SEN Manager?

Don't be afraid to engage the services of an SEN implementation consultant to set up your Companion, and/or open an SAP Support ticket, because SAP Companion setup is not normally a DIY effort.

entry.title: Re: Transaction key RA2 chart of accounts RAJ1 not define...

entry.title: Single WF in SAP Data Services
entry.content: Can anyone please explain the sentence that is marked in yellow in the below screenshot?What exactly does different threads mean here?

entry.title: Re: SD downpayment amount should include tax value
entry.content: Dear Emmayoung, I agree with what @yschlaeppi is saying. DP in FI does not include tax. It is just an advance payment. The taxes are calculated on the actual invoice/invoice verification because you have considerable information to tell system to determine taxes. DP then adjusted to the invoice or IV. Thanks Avnish

entry.title: Re: Report that Shows Purchase Orders that have attachmen...
entry.content:
Hello @Marcus_Raisch 

If the attachments were added using DMS then you could use the Manage Documents app for the Document Type involved used to add the attachments to the Purchase Orders to get a list 

 

We have also the released CDS view I_DOCUMENTINFORECORDOBJECTLINK .

For Purchase Orders the BusinessObjectTypeName is  

  • BUS2012 (purchase order)

  • EKPO (purchase order items)

This is documented at the resource Attachments within Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0053

You could use the CDS view I_DOCUMENTINFORECORDOBJECTLINK with BUS2012 or EKPO for LinkedSAPObject to see what DIR are connected to Purchasing Documents and then A_DOCUMENTINFORECORDATTCH to retrieve attachment information

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Legal Right to use RFC component
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,
I cannot find anything releated to the following topic:

We have a SAP customer, that has various RFC Function Modules provided by a third party company.

Is it legal to use and consume those RFC components? So once a Module has been transported to the customer's SAP he has the right to use this components anytime?
We are not talking about modifiying, Just to use them

I cannot find anythink releated in the SAP Knownledge base.

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: contract to delivery
entry.content: Hi, thank you for your answer. It really helped me.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Implement Observability in a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide
entry.content: SAP Cloud Logging is the successor of SAP Application Logging service for SAP BTP. The deprecation of SAP Application Logging service is in preparation and will be announced soon. The detailed timelines for that step will be made available with the upcoming announcement. SAP Cloud Logging can be used as a drop-in replacement.

entry.title: Re: Storage types 020, 021 and 022
entry.content:
Hello @Marcel_Kuijper 

A sequence of storage types during stock placement and stock removal is customized with storage type search strategies - SPRO: Logistics Execution -> Warehouse Management -> Strategies -> Activate Storage Type Search

You can set them up whichever way is required.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Custom Fiori application tile not found in Content Manager
entry.content:
I am facing a peculiar issue, specifically in our Pre-Production environment. There is one singular application for which no results are returned when trying to search for and add its tile in the Content Manager's page designer. It shows up fine on both development and testing environments. I have created a local copy and done all assignments following the other configurations, just in case. The app also is itself listed within the content manager, it just doesn't show up when searching for tiles to add to the page.

Any idea what might be the cause here and if there's a solution available?

Thanks.

Girish

entry.title: Re: Unable to determine source storage bin during repleni...
entry.content:
Hi 

As per my understanding, source bin determination is a part of stock removal startegy. you need see and check again. Check source bin status it should not be blocked. 

Check setting from scratch it will help you

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Profit center in settlement document in CCM
entry.content:
Hello,

Please refer to OSS note 1532865 - FAQ: Profit center in billing document. It is standard behavior to have the system clear out the profit center at time of billing for intercompany transactions. This is why SAP has provided another field in VBAP called "PCTRF" which can be filled with a PCA substitution. You should fix the missing profit center at time of order creation and invoice posting. It is also possible to use transfer manager event 65 - Default data item document creation to default the missing profit center as last resort.

entry.title: Re: Create New Production Connector Error
entry.content:
Hi , 

1. check the user role as listed here 

https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCTION_CONNECTOR/4e745bf0056e451c85002c21a51d2ebc/59dccc1c44f24cc789819f12d2bc19dc.html?version=2.1

2. Check if the user authorization is maintained inside production connector with specific userid (email). 

1. Open control center in admin mode .

2. Navigate to Cloud integration >> User configuration 

3. Add your DM user details (userid/email)  and assign required roles as below

Hope this helps.

Thanks

Rahul

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

Can you please share Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management
entry.content:
Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management are designed to help you manage and monitor the volume of data in your SAP systems. They provide a user-friendly interface and a variety of tools to help you analyze data volume, identify potential issues, and take corrective action.

Here are some of the key Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management:

1. Data Volume Management Cockpit: This app provides an overview of the data volume situation in your system. It allows you to monitor data growth, identify large tables, and analyze data distribution.

2. Data Volume Management Analytics: This app provides detailed analytics on data volume, including historical data and forecasts. It can help you identify trends and potential issues.

3. Data Volume Management Work Center: This app provides a central location for all data volume management tasks. It allows you to manage and monitor data volume, perform data aging, and execute data volume reduction measures. Please refer to the following KBA for a screenshot of the apps available in Data Volume Management WorkCenter: 3522671 - Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management https://me.sap.com/notes/3522671

Please note that the availability of these apps may depend on your SAP version and the specific Fiori Apps package you have installed.

For more detailed information, I would recommend visiting the SAP Fiori Apps Library (https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/), where you can find detailed descriptions and technical information for each app.

 

In addition to the Fiori Apps, you might also find the Data Volume Management Cloud App useful. This app provides a comprehensive solution for managing your data volume in a more efficient and effective manner.
For more detailed information about this app, please refer to the following documentation:

2868449 - Data Volume Management App - FAQ - SAP for Me

2716655 - How To Use the Data Volume Management APP - Step by Step guide - SAP for Me

These documents provide a step-by-step guide on how to use the app, as well as answers to frequently asked questions.

entry.title: Re: How To reverse the Stock UPLOADED UNDER /SCWM/ISU
entry.content: Check Queue in SMQ2 it is clear

entry.title: Product Updates for SAP Build Code – September 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

As we wrap up another exciting month, we wanted to take a moment to share some of the latest updates with you. With September coming to a close, we are getting ready for two major events in the SAP Community - Devtoberfest and TechEd. For more information, be sure to read the rest of this release information.

 

Support SAP S/4HANA Cloud Service Integration for Data Model and App Logic

You can use our generative AI assistant Joule in SAP Build Code to help you to write code quickly and easily by providing natural language prompts. As you know, we are constantly listening to your feedback to make our tools even better. One request we got was to enable AI support for external service scenarios. We are excited to tell you that it is now possible to use Joule to generate code for your integrated SAP S/4HANA Cloud services.

You start by creating your full-stack application, importing an external SAP S/4HANA Cloud service, and defining the data model and services. (With Joule, you can easily create your data model and services.)

Data Model and Service creation with the help of Joule

With our new feature, it is now possible to use Joule to enhance the data model you created before: You can add associations between the external entity and local entities, and you can expose the external entity to a local service via a projection.

Using Joule to add an association between the entity Books and the external entity A_BusinessPartner

We've also added support for custom logic generation to read the associated external SAP S/4HANA Cloud entity and to manipulate the exposed external entity.

Using Joule to add a custom logic reading data from the external entity A_BusinessPartner

 

SQL Notebooks for SAP HANA

SAP Build Code offers notebook functionality, similar to the well-known Jupyter notebooks. Since Q3 2024 the SAP HANA tools in SAP Build Code offer a notebook experience for executing SQL statements on an SAP HANA Cloud database.

To get started, create an SAP HANA dev space. Inside the dev space, create a file with the .notebook extension and open it. The file will be opened with the default notebook editor. Next, create a code block. The default code block type should be “SAP HANA Connection Management”. This code block type allows opening, closing, and selecting a database connection. Typing ‘#’ opens the value help with the available commands.

Choose the “List database connections” Command

Choose the “List database connections” command and execute the code block. A list of the available database connections from the SAP HANA Database Explorer view will be shown. You can choose a database connection to use for the notebook by clicking on its name in the list. The selected database will be highlighted with a different background color.

Select Database Connection

Now you can create another code block for executing SQL statements. Be sure to change the code block type to “SAP HANA SQL” by clicking on the “SAP HANA Connection Management” indicator in the bottom right corner and choosing “SAP HANA SQL” from the subsequent dialog.

Execute SQL Queries

Add one or more SQL statements and execute the code block. The results will be shown below the code block.

Add SQL Statements and Execute the Code Block

You can add more code and markdown blocks as needed.

 

Devtoberfest and TechEd

Get ready for an exciting journey of learning and collaboration with Devtoberfest and SAP TechEd Virtual!

From September 23rd to October 25th, 2024, join us for Devtoberfest, a celebration of coding and collaboration within the SAP Community. This virtual event is designed to prepare you for the highly anticipated SAP TechEd. My colleague Ravi summarizes all you need to know about SAP Build Code at Devtoberfest. For further information, read the Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome blog post and join the Devtoberfest group in SAP Community to take part in this great event!

And don't forget to mark your calendar for SAP TechEd Virtual on October 8-9, 2024, your gateway to the latest innovations and advancements in SAP technologies! The session catalog is now live, featuring a wide range of topics across various tracks, including the Application Development and Automation and the Data and Analytics tracks, where you'll find dedicated sessions on SAP Build Code. You are looking for a summary where to find SAP Build Code at SAP TechEd? Then I recommend to read this blog post.

Don't miss these opportunities to enhance your technical expertise and connect with the SAP community.

 

Let Us Hear Your Voice!

We prepared a short survey, focused on improving the product to better fit your needs. By participating, you can help us improve SAP Build Code and SAP Business Application Studio. It should only take 5 minutes to complete. Please take the survey now.

 

For further information on new features, please check our roadmaps: roadmap for SAP Build Code, SAPUI5 Road Map. And have a look at What's New in SAP Build Code, the What's New Viewer for SAPUI5 and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Release Notes. If you want to stay up-to-date with news, learning resources, and product and strategy updates for SAP Build Code: follow our tag.

We look forward to seeing how you use these new capabilities to create innovative solutions and drive your projects forward. Stay tuned for more updates and happy coding! 😊

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content:
I can't find any notes of changing an SETVALMIN/SETVALMAX.
And when i try to call a transaction 
At once as 'AT SELECTION SCREEN OUTPUT' block is started the variable '$7E-MATN' initializes with char24, it cuts off few last characters of the material i have entered at screen.
The type of $7E-MATN'  is KKB_MATNR(char40). And at GR53 there is no any mention of matnr.

entry.title: Selecting hierarchy for Calendar Year/Month dimension
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In Edit section of Import job when I try to select No hierarchy for Calendar Year/Month dimension it's not possible. Does it have to do something with query settings on BW or with changes since the last SAC update? Colleagues checked settings on BW query, but nothing has been changed since the query was made. 

Kind regards,

Marija

entry.title: Multiple tax condition on a Single Line of Order/billing
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a business situation that requests me to use handling and freight as condition types in the SD pricing procedure. We are adding freight and handling as condition type on the first line of the order/billing line item.

I also have a business requirement to calculate tax on freight and handling separately from the product price in line 1 of the order/billing.

As per standard SAP, only one tax condition is allowed to be assigned per line. How can I calculate different taxes on product vs Freight assuming both product price and freight charges are on line 1 of the order/billing?

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - turn off
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

is in Public Cloud possible to turn of the error: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance when we are creating Inbound Delivery from PO?

Thank you

#SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC - One central check system for multiple systems on various releases
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

Ok, I understand. Thank you very much for all your help.

BR,

FAFR

entry.title: Re: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - turn off
entry.content: Picture:

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Document Integration with SharePoint
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM 

Hi everyone,

I'm looking for feedback from anyone who has experience using document integration with SharePoint for storing PDFs or Word documents.

In scenarios where we have multiple projects within the same landscape, how can we manage modifications to solution design or business process documents across these projects? Typically, in Solution Manager's Soldoc, we have options for release and versioning to track these details.

Thanks for your insights!

entry.title: Add custom fields in header area of Manage Purchase Requisition Professional Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement to add few custom fields in Header area of Manage Purchase requisition professional Fiori app for on premise S/4 Hana 2020.

There is NO business context available to add custom fields at header area using Custom Fields and Logic (CFL) Fiori app. This is ruled out.

Other alternative is extending standard Manage Purchase Requisition Professional Fiori app in BAS or VS Code , but BAS and VS code is not allowing for controller replacement logic for this app. I think this is also ruled out.

Other alternative is creating Extension Project (Manage PR Professional) in WebIDE, while creating extension project I am getting the error as "Extending Smart applications is currently is not supported". 

other alternative is, I have followed this blog Add New Fields To "S/4HANA Manage Purchase Requisi... - SAP Community, but with this I can see the custom fields header area in read only. I am unable to make it as editable. I tried to make these custom field as editable by setting @ObjectModel.readOnly: false. with this I am getting error as "Error related to element 'ZZXXXXX' of entity 'C_PURCHASEREQNHEADER(CDS)': The element ' 1" and Manage Purchase Requisition professional app is not loading.

Could you please let me know how this can be achieved. i,e. Add custom fields in the header area of Manage Purchase Requisition Professional Fiori app

Regards

Rajendar

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Wroclaw Request: Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python
entry.content: I have recorded your request and an expert on the topic will be in touch to discuss details.

entry.title: Re: How to lock and unlock users in SAP BTP?
entry.content: Hello Vijay, Could you confirm the approach you followed. We have similar situation.

entry.title: SAP TM: Suppler Invoice Create (B2B) Service not shown in System
entry.content:
Dear experts,

my goal is to implement the Carrier Invoice Interface for TM (also with Dispute Management integration): Supplier Invoice - Create (B2B) | SAP Help Portal. 

In the link above, follwing namespace is mentioned: http://sap.com/xi/TMS/Global

But i cant find that Service with that namespace in SPROXY Transaction. All i find is the InvoiceRequest_In with Namespace "http://sap.com/xi/EDI/Buyer".

Why is that? Should i try the http://sap.com/xi/EDI/Buyer InvoiceRequest_In?

entry.title: Re: Variant Table - Line not valid
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Could you provide more context to identify the problem (e.g., which product, product version, and table you are working with)? Thank you very much!

I'm going to find an expert who can help you. Of course, creating a ticket is more confidential if you do not want to disclose further information here.

Best Regards,

Florian

entry.title: Can I set the ItemCustomerContractReference in a sales order via ABSL
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

maybe you can help me with that issue. I'm working currently on a solution, that create's new sales order items from a custom BO. The request is also to set a CustomerContractReference in those items. I understand, that the Association in the sales order has set the public write access to "no". Though I hoped to find a workaround.

I tried to set a BTDR in the CustomerContract, which returns an error

I tried to use the ItemAccountingCodingBlockDistribution. I can create that association in a sales order (because probably it is not used in sales orders?)

Does anyone have had the same problem or another idea how to change the customer-contract reference in a sales order?

 

Best regards

and thanks in advance

Niko

entry.title: Re: SD downpayment amount should include tax value
entry.content: @yschlaeppi I agree that DP request should not post with sales-tax booking. I think it is the title I give here not exact. what I really want is when DP request post, the value should be a gross amount, because our customer pay the down-payments as gross amount not net amount. if I directly post DP request with net amount, the latter actual payment from customer will be inconsistent. so what I really want to is how to post the DP amount with Gross amount~

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content:
Both data elements use the SETVAL domain, AFAIK this domain should have been converted to 40 when long item numbers were activated.

  • Is the conversion recent
  • Which system version/type ECC vs HANA, on promise vs cloud

Consider raising an incident (a case nowadays)

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to switch my CDS view (odata v2) for POs to OData v4?
entry.content: I'll explain why I ask.
